sections.reason: The real-hardware experiment refuted the hypothesis (combined MAPE 62.1% vs baseline 42.1%; delta -20.0 pp; only 47% within 30%). The next step is isomer-deepsci-analysis to identify transfer gaps, especially launch-overhead-dominated small configs and the mismatch between calibrated efficiency factors and real B200 scheduling.

summary: Route to analysis after real-hardware experiment refuted the selected hypothesis.
title: Experiment Route Decision: Analysis
